title: Group 1 - Spanish-English cognates / near-cognates
description: Strictly selected: the Spanish word is almost the same as an English meaning in the source list, and the meaning matches.

entries.english: al final: finally, in the end

title: Group 2 - Grammar / function words
description: Articles, pronouns, possessives, demonstratives, prepositions, conjunctions, question/relative words, particles, negation, and common connectors.

entries.english: en cuanto a: in terms of, regarding

title: Group 3 - Remaining vocabulary
description: All remaining words, including words that may look Latin-based but are not clearly almost the same as their English meaning.

entries.english: reason; tener razón: to be right
al frente: facing; frente a: across from
to divide, leave; a partir de: starting
measure; a medida que: to the extent
sorrow; a pesar de: in spite of
respect, con respecto a: with regards to
end, bit; llevar a c.: to carry out
trouble; valer la pena: be of worth
pair, couple (m); a la par: at same time
por vía: by means; road, way
to think, be of the opinion
y pico: and a bit; beak, peak
to exhaust, wear out, run out
to go for a walk, ride
al revés: backwards, upside down, inside out
turn, shift; en turno a: around
to carry out, cause to happen
trick, trap; hacer trampa: to cheat
en seguida: right away, at once
to make an effort, exert oneself
to be too much, left over
dessert; a la postre: in the end
relief; poner de relieve: to emphasize
climax; para colmo: to top it all
to use for the first time, debut
in days gone by, last year
departure, first half of a trip
